ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1 = 1st, 2 = 2nd, 3 = 3rd) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Gender (1 = Male, 2 = Female) */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "ticket" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "embarked" INTEGER /* Port of embarkation (0 = C = Cherbourg, 1 = Q = Queenstown, 2 = S = Southampton) */,
  "age_group" INTEGER /* Age group (1 = Child, 2 = Adult, 3 = Senior) */,
  "alone" INTEGER /* Traveling alone (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "fare_group" INTEGER /* Fare group (0 = Low, 1 = Medium, 2 = High, 3 = Very High, 4 = Luxury) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title (e.g., Mr, Mrs, Miss, Dr) */,
  "family_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family group */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Passenger's occupation */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Passenger's nationality */,
  "destination_port" TEXT /* Destination port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_cabin FOREIGN KEY ("cabin") REFERENCES cabin_assignments ("cabin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_fare_group FOREIGN KEY ("fare_group") REFERENCES fare_groups ("fare_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_survived FOREIGN KEY ("survived") REFERENCES survival_status ("survival_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_pclass FOREIGN KEY ("pclass") REFERENCES passenger_class ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_age_group FOREIGN KEY ("age_group") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_ticket FOREIGN KEY ("ticket") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_title FOREIGN KEY ("title") REFERENCES titles ("title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked FOREIGN KEY ("embarked") REFERENCES ports ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the group (e.g., 0-18, 19-60, 61+) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fare_groups" (
  "fare_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fare group */,
  "fare_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the fare group */,
  "fare_range" TEXT /* Fare range for the group (e.g., 0-10, 10-50, 50-100, 100+) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fare group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fare_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "titles" (
  "title_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each title */,
  "title_name" TEXT /* Name of the title (e.g., Mr, Mrs, Miss, Dr) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "port_code" TEXT /* Code of the port (e.g., C, Q, S) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabin_assignments" (
  "cabin_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each cabin */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number assigned to the passenger */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck of the cabin */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number within the deck */,
  "cabin_type" TEXT /* Type of cabin (e.g., single, shared, luxury) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cabin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number assigned to the passenger */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the ticket (e.g., 1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid for the ticket */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1 = 1st, 2 = 2nd, 3 = 3rd) */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "passenger_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first passenger in the relationship */,
  "passenger_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second passenger in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., sibling, spouse, parent, child) */,
  "relationship_strength" REAL /* Strength of the relationship (e.g., 0.5, 1.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_relationships_passenger_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id_2") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_relationships_passenger_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id_1") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_status" (
  "survival_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival status */,
  "survival_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the survival status (e.g., Survived, Did Not Survive) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survival status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survival_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_class" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the passenger class (1 = 1st, 2 = 2nd, 3 = 3rd) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the passenger class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the passenger data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the passenger data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., web, API, mobile app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., Logistic Regression, Random Forest) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "training_data_range" TEXT /* Range of training data used to train the model */,
  "evaluation_metrics" TEXT /* Evaluation metrics for the model (e.g., precision, recall, F1 score) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
